walmart.summary: FNE supermarket-cartel case (2016-2019): Walmart Chile, Cencosud, SMU settled fresh-chicken price-fixing case at the Tribunal de Defensa de la Libre Competencia; CLP 33B in total fines (Walmart-Chile portion ~CLP 5B).

enel-chile-s-a.summary: FNE conditions on Enel Chile distribution post-2022 generation-distribution unbundling; merger-control settlements.
